channel.title: Design Patterns on Aman Goyal
channel.description: Recent content in Design Patterns on Aman Goyal

item.title: Sidecar Pattern
item.description: Core Concept Sidecar pattern = two containers in one pod Main container → core logic Sidecar → supporting functionality Shared: Network (localhost) Filesystem Namespaces Why It Matters Extend without modifying Add features externally Ideal for legacy systems Enable cloud-native behavior Dynamic config Runtime updates Reusability Logging, monitoring, proxy sidecars Separation of concerns App → business logic Sidecar → infra concerns Design Principles Parameterize via env vars Maintain stable interfaces Document clearly Trade-offs Pros Modular Reusable No code changes Cons Extra overhead More moving parts One-line Summary Sidecars extend application capabilities by attaching helper containers without modifying the main app.
